verification.query: query { deployments(where: {deploy_id: {_eq: "<id>"}}) { deploy_id errored error_message block_number block_hash } }

notes.tokenFacetUri: Logged at deploy-time as ("TokenFacetURI", rho:id:...). Also discoverable via @"asi_stoken_v1" from any deploy on ASI:Chain DevNet.
notes.adminFacetUri: Logged at deploy-time as ("AdminFacetURI", rho:id:...). Not recovered from this deploy — validator stdout is not exposed by the current DevNet infrastructure.
